text: FedEx: Your parcel (tracking <ACCT>) has been held at customs. A duty of <AMOUNT> must be paid within 24 hours to release it. Pay securely at <URL> or it will be returned.

Meesho: Seller ne aapke order ki COD amount galat set ki hai. Actual amount se <AMOUNT> ka fark hai. <URL> pe difference pay karein delivery ke liye.
